component.name: RapidChecksum
component.summary: Hash files and load or save SFV checksum manifests

description.p: RapidChecksum is a Linux file hashing utility built with Rust and Qt. It calculates CRC32, MD5, SHA1, SHA256, SHA512, ED2K, BLAKE, and SHA-3 hashes, and it can load or save UTF-8 SFV checksum files for CRC32 verification workflows.
